host_permissions.description: Full access to ALL websites on the internet

content_scripts.description: Full access to ALL websites on the internet

web_accessible_resources.description: Full access to ALL websites on the internet

risk_factors: Has <all_urls> access - can read/modify ALL websites

delayed_activation.description: Code contains long-duration timers. Could be legitimate (scheduled tasks) or malicious (time bomb).
delayed_activation.impact: Static analysis only - dynamic verification recommended
delayed_activation.recommendation: Manual review required. Many extensions legitimately use timers for scheduled tasks, updates, or reminders.

recommendation.rationale: Extension has limited data access. Standard monitoring sufficient.

threat_attribution.campaign_description: Corporate espionage campaign targeting video conferencing platforms. Part of DarkSpectre threat actor operations affecting 8.8 million users worldwide.

source_articles.title: DarkSpectre Browser Extension Campaigns Exposed After Impacting 8.8 Million Users Worldwide
DarkSpectre: Unmasking the Threat Actor Behind 8.8 Million Infected Browsers
Zoom Stealer browser extensions harvest corporate meeting intelligence

threat_attribution.osint_summary:
## OSINT Analysis - CONFIRMED MALICIOUS EXTENSION

**Extension Identified:** Google Meet Auto Admit (ID: pabkjoplheapcclldpknfpcepheldbga)
**Database Status:** SUSPECTED MALICIOUS
**Severity:** HIGH

**Campaign Attribution:** DarkSpectre / ZoomStealer
**Threat Actor:** DarkSpectre (Chinese state-sponsored APT)

**Campaign Overview:**
Corporate espionage campaign targeting video conferencing platforms. Part of DarkSpectre threat actor operations affecting 8.8 million users worldwide.

**Active Period:** 2018-2025

**Impact:**
- Total users affected: 8,800,000
- This campaign: 2,200,000 users
- Known extensions in campaign: 19

**Targets:**
- Zoom
- Microsoft Teams
- Google Meet
- Webex
- GoToMeeting

**Data Exfiltrated:**
- Meeting URLs with embedded passwords
- Meeting IDs and topics
- Scheduled meeting times
- Registration status
- Participant information
- Chrome cookies
- Browser history

**C2 Infrastructure:**
- meetingtv.us
- webinartv.us
- us-central1-webinarstvus.cloudfunctions.net
- zoomcorder.firebaseio.com

**TTPs (MITRE ATT&CK):**
- Initial Access: Malicious browser extension
- Persistence: Extension auto-update
- Collection: Content script injection on video conferencing sites
- Exfiltration: WebSocket connections to Firebase
- C2: Google Cloud Functions endpoints

campaign_data.description: Corporate espionage campaign targeting video conferencing platforms. Part of DarkSpectre threat actor operations affecting 8.8 million users worldwide.

ttps.collection: Content script injection on video conferencing sites
